heading: Geospatial Relevance
body:
You can use the [$geoNear](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/geoNear) and the [near](near-ref) operator
inside [$search](pipe.$search) for a geographic location search within the
`$rankFusion` or `$scoreFusion` stage. However, the
[$geoNear](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/geoNear) and the [near](near-ref) operator use
different coordinate reference frames. Therefore, the result ordinals
and scores might not be identical.
